title: melia hasskarlii
intro: Melia hasskarlii is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, belonging to the family Meliaceae and commonly known as the 'Haskarlii tree'. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain meliacine, a toxic compound that has been used to treat various health issues. The seeds of Melia hasskarlii have been used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and are also believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, contributing to its health benefits. In traditional medicine, the seeds are prepared through various herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
